data.content:
You are a senior UI architect building a modern enterprise Transport Management System interface.
You must design a clean, minimal Apple-style logistics platform UI for a trucking company.
The interface should include dashboards, fleet management, logistics operations, finance, HR and admin panels.

Generate a modern Transport Management System interface structure with these modules:

Dashboard
Operations
Fleet
Finance
AI & Risk
Administration

The dashboard must show:
- trucks currently working
- number of completed trips
- total gross trip value

Design should follow Apple Liquid Glass style:
soft shadows
glass transparency
smooth animations
clean layout

The UI must support role-based access for:
Owner
Director
Logistics
HR
Finance
Security
Drivers
Clients
Administrator

Generate full UI structure.
